memory-core.purpose: Lightweight YAML parsing and filesystem observation for durable memory and offline sharing.

search.purpose: Opt-in FastEmbed multilingual hybrid retrieval with Qdrant local or server mode.

mcp.purpose: Stateless MCP stdio sidecar with ten tools, authorized resources, and negotiated subscriptions.

derive.purpose: Bounded PDF text extraction and image validation for the optional Tesseract OCR provider.
derive.externalProvider: Image OCR invokes a separately installed Tesseract executable with a timeout; PDF extraction is local and dependency-contained.

memory.purpose: Umbrella installation seam for all currently declared optional dependency families.
